Focusing Connection.description: Touch an animal ally (regain your martial focus): it gains +[[2]] on all saving throws for [[1]] round (+[[2]] per [[10]] ranks in Handle Animal or Ride).

Frenzy Rider.description: Distribute to your mount: +[[1]] competence on all attack rolls with natural weapons (you take -[[1]] on your own attacks and combat maneuvers while active; scales per the talent).

Armored Charge.description: Distribute to your mount (also applies to you while mounted): +[[1]] to CMD against bull rush, overrun, and trip (higher at [[10]] ranks in Ride); no squeezing penalties and no armor-check penalty on Ride checks.

Aura Of Fear.description: Hostile creatures within range must make a Will Save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] or be shaken while they remain (this buff applies shaken: -[[2]] on attack rolls and saves), +[[1d4]] rounds after leaving; a creature that saves is immune for [[24]] hours. Range is 25 ft + 5 ft per 2 base attack bonus.

Inspiring Pose.description: One ally within range may immediately re-attempt a saving throw (at the original DC) against an ongoing effect afflicting them, even one already failed; +[[1]] more ally per [[4]] ranks in Intimidate.

Defend Other.description: Immediate action when an ally in your threatened area is attacked: grant +[[max(1, floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2))]] competence AC against that attack (you may take the damage in their place if it still hits).

Cover Ally.description: While you have martial focus, extend your active defense (the miss chance / interpose) to an ally within your shield's reach when they are attacked.

Aggressive Flanking.description: Allied creatures within range count as flanking a shared target regardless of their relative positions.

Coordinated Reflexes.description: Allies within range gain +[[1]] morale on Reflex saves against area attacks and effects (+[[1]] per [[4]] ranks in Diplomacy).

Cry Of Confrontation.description: Distribute to each enemy that failed a Will Save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] against your shout: -[[1]] on attack rolls that do not include you as a target.

Fierce Shout.description: You and affected allies gain +[[1]] morale on damage rolls on their first attack each turn (+[[1]] per [[2]] ranks in Diplomacy). Mind-affecting emotion effect.

Fortifying Phalanx.description: Allies within range gain +[[1]] morale on Fortitude saves (+[[1]] per [[4]] ranks in Diplomacy) while within reach of another affected ally.

Heraldry.description: While you hold your banner, allies of your allegiance who can see it (including you) gain +[[1]] on attack rolls within the area of a tactic and treat your tactics as having +[[5]] ranks of Diplomacy.

Masterful Coordination.description: Allies within range may use aid another to grant +[[3]] to attack rolls or AC (+[[1]] per [[10]] ranks in Diplomacy) to another affected ally against a threatened opponent; lasts until the aiding ally's next turn.

Fursome Aura.description: Targets within the aura must make a Will Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + @spheres.cam ]] or be shaken while they remain (shaken: -[[2]] on attack rolls and saves); a creature that saves cannot be affected again for a time.

Bestial.description: Your companion gains a chosen set of natural attacks (e.g. a primary [[1d6]] bite); may be taken multiple times for more.

Mystical Companion.description: Your companion gains a ki pool (half its Hit Dice + Wis modifier, minimum [[1]]); while it has ki, its unarmed and natural attacks count as magic (and more per the talent).

Regenerating Companion.description: Your companion's fast healing becomes regeneration (overcome by two chosen damage types); it is not dismissed at 0 hp unless the regeneration is suppressed.

Swarm Companion.description: Your companion gains the swarm subtype (Tiny members), dealing [[1d6 + (floor(@spheres.cl.total / 3))d6]] swarm damage; shrinks a size at caster level [[10]] and [[15]].

Troop Companion.description: Your companion gains the troop subtype (Small/Medium members), dealing [[1d6 + (floor(@spheres.cl.total / 3))d6]] troop damage with its attacks' enhancement and reach.

Raging Companion.description: Your companion rages (barbarian): +[[4]] morale to Strength and Constitution, +[[2]] morale on Will saves, -[[2]] AC, for rounds/day equal to the higher of its Con modifier or Hit Dice.

Greater Serendipity.description: Used with Serendipity: enemies within the area also suffer -[[1]] on attack rolls, skill checks, ability checks, and saving throws (a curse) equal to the luck bonus your allies gain.

Serendipity.description: All allies within range gain +[[1]] luck on attack rolls, skill checks, ability checks, and saving throws while you concentrate (spend [[1]] spell point to sustain for [[1]] round per caster level).

Strength.description: Grant this motif to a target: +[[2]] insight (+[[1]] per [[4]] caster levels) to CMB, CMD, Strength checks, and Strength-based skill checks.

Adrenaline Surge.description: When you use a Life sphere effect on an ally (spend [[1]] spell point), they may take one immediate action: an attack at their highest base attack bonus, a move (provoking), or an Escape Artist check.

Mind Shield.description: Ward a willing creature: +[[1]] morale (+[[1]] per [[2]] caster levels) on saves against mind-altering effects for [[@spheres.cl.total]] rounds.

Peace And Love.description: Enemies within this 30-ft aura take -[[1]] on all attack rolls (mind-affecting compulsion). Suppress or resume as a free action.

Favorable Momentum.description: Allies may spend [[2]] points of momentum (decided before the roll) to add a [[1d6]] circumstance bonus to any skill or ability check, once each per turn.

Revitalizing Momentum.description: As a swift action an ally may spend momentum (max equal to your casting ability modifier) to gain [[1d4]] temporary hp per point spent, lasting that many rounds.

Strike.description: Rally an ally (spend [[1]] spell point): it may make a combat maneuver (not grapple or Escape Artist) against a threatened enemy without provoking, with +[[floor(@spheres.cl.total / 5)]] morale to the CMB check.

Tenacity.description: Distribute to your mandate partner: when one member succeeds on a saving throw, the other gains +[[4]] morale on saving throws.

Totem Of Expulsion.description: Totem aura (spend [[1]] spell point): non-native outsiders within (including allies) are sickened with no save (-[[2]] on attack rolls, damage, saves, and skill checks) while inside.

Totem Of Insanity.description: Totem aura (spend [[1]] spell point): enemies entering or present at creation make a Will Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + @spheres.cam ]] or, at the start of their next turn, have a [[50]]% chance to attack their own nearest ally.

Totem Of Tactical Prowess.description: Totem aura: whenever you or an ally gains a positioning bonus to attack or AC (flanking, higher ground, cover), that bonus is increased by +[[1]] (+[[1]] per [[5]] caster levels).
